name: github_search
description: Search GitHub for repositories, issues, pull requests, code, or users. Returns top results with key details. Use this when the user asks to find repos, look up issues, search code on GitHub, or investigate open-source projects.

type.description: The type of GitHub search to perform

query.description: The search query string (supports GitHub search syntax, e.g. 'language:rust stars:>1000')

limit.description: Max number of results to return (default 5, max 10)
